title: plantago major f. dura
intro: Plantago major f. dura, also known as broadleaf plantain, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Its leaves, stems, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of broadleaf plantain include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of broadleaf plantain can be found in teas, tinctures, salves, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
